Solar Recycling Solutions for Government

Supporting Councils and Government Agencies with Cost-Effective, Compliant Solar Waste Management

Partnering for a Sustainable Public Sector

At PV Industries, we work with local councils, state departments, and federal government entities to deliver cost-efficient and compliant solar panel recycling solutions. As Australia continues its clean energy transition, we help public sector organisations manage end-of-life solar infrastructure responsibly while meeting environmental targets and budget expectations.

Speak to Our Government Services Team

Why Government Agencies Choose PV Industries

Government-led solar programs are accelerating across Australia—but end-of-life solar waste presents a new challenge. Our solutions help you stay ahead of regulatory requirements while managing solar panel waste sustainably and economically.

Key Benefits for Government Partners:

  • Cost-efficient bulk recycling and logistics planning
  • Compliance with EPA and sustainability standards
  • Circular economy outcomes for public asset recovery
  • Nationwide collection and processing capacity
  • Customised services for council facilities, schools, libraries, and housing programs

Whether you manage a local solar upgrade scheme, a government housing initiative, or a solar-powered transport hub, PV Industries is equipped to handle your solar waste stream from collection through to final recycling and reporting.

Comprehensive Government Solutions

Working with Local Councils

Services Include:

  • Bulk solar panel pickup and disposal from transfer stations or depots
  • End-of-life system collection from public buildings and facilities
  • Drop-off and collection programs for residents (community recycling programs)
  • Reporting on waste diversion rates for council sustainability reporting
  • Public education support, such as materials and signage for solar waste disposal areas

Planning a council-wide solar upgrade or clean-out?

Let us manage the end-of-life process and reduce long-term disposal costs.

Supporting State & Federal Agencies

Services Include:

  • Solar panel recovery and recycling for government buildings and energy efficiency programs
  • Large-scale project decommissioning support (e.g. schools, hospitals, transport infrastructure)
  • Transparent environmental reporting aligned with state and national frameworks
  • Support for Circular Economy and Net Zero government targets
  • Help meet procurement guidelines, ESG goals, and budget expectations

Designed for Cost Efficiency and Long-Term Impact

Save Time and Reduce Risk

  • Centralised solar waste logistics and disposal
  • Reduced landfill fees and liability
  • Trusted partner for long-term public sector contracts

Boost Environmental Performance

  • Recover valuable materials like aluminium, silicon, and glass
  • Divert solar waste from landfill
  • Report on emissions reduction and landfill avoidance

Maintain Public Trust

  • Demonstrate environmental leadership
  • Improve transparency with full waste tracking and audit trails
  • Support community and industry expectations for responsible resource management

Our Values for Public Sector Collaboration

At PV Industries, our values guide our work with government partners:

Transparency & Trust

We provide clear, verifiable reporting and communicate openly with all stakeholders.

Customer-Focused Innovation

Our services adapt to the needs of government partners, ensuring efficiency, reliability, and alignment with policy goals.

Commitment to Sustainability

We're proud to help government organisations lead the charge in building a circular, low-waste energy future for Australia.

Public Sector Excellence

We understand government procurement, compliance requirements, and the importance of delivering value for taxpayers.

Government Sector Testimonials

"Working with PV Industries made our solar infrastructure replacement program simple and cost-effective. Their team handled the logistics and reporting with professionalism."

– Cassandra L.

NSW Local Government Environmental Coordinator

"We needed a partner who understood both environmental compliance and tight project budgets. PV Industries delivered on both."

– Mark T.

State Energy Efficiency Program Manager

Ready to Partner with PV Industries?

We're here to help government departments and councils meet sustainability targets while keeping costs down. Whether you manage solar for a few buildings or hundreds, our national network and proven expertise make us a smart choice for the public sector.
